stemHtml: In a multi-engine aircraft with one engine inoperative, which condition would lead to a worse angle of attack on the fin?

options.a: Increased angle of attack on the operating engine's side.
options.b: Decreased angle of attack on the operating engine's side.
options.c: Increased angle of attack on the inoperative engine's side.
options.d: Decreased angle of attack on the inoperative engine's side.
